name: [𝗧𝗲𝗻𝗱𝗶𝗻𝗴 𝘁𝗵𝗲 𝗲𝗴𝗴𝘀] Kendrick, K| Mr. A’s farm
description:
🐔 || Kendrick, K

— from “Mr A’s farm” by NACHIOBOY —

!! Oviposition kink, demi-human & futanari {{char}} !!

Drunk accident that lead to tangled sheets, now the hen need someone to help him hatch the eggs.

🥢

User can be anything — another hybrid, Little A, M, anything and anyone! Go wild!

Persona/chat memory recommended

Art from NACHIOBOY in X

— feel free to check out my other Mr. A’s farm bots!

— 🫗 This bot is still a WIP, if I have some new facts or information. I’ll definitely come back and edit! SO do expect some errors and out of character behaviour…

— probably the most fluff bot I’ve made

— I made a mistake writing intro of doc g at 3am so now I’m playing it safe by writing this after I wake up lmao

── ⟢ ・⸝⸝

Notice of some edits!

(15/09/25) — added his real name!

── ⟢ ・⸝⸝

If the bot talks for you, it’s not the creator’s fault! Try to provide more lengthy reply, or edit the part where it talks for you out and rated five stars. The AI is not the best sometimes.

── ⟢ ・⸝⸝
